global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a focus on product promotion.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock of products at a special price.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The text 'LuxShelf' is prominently displayed at the top, featuring a bold and modern font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three stylized product images resembling shelves are centered in the ad, outlined in a soft pink color.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element that adds visual interest, possibly a graphic or icon, located near the product display.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: Another graphic element that complements the product display, adding depth to the composition.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: The text 'Limited stock Only this weekend' is displayed in a clear, bold font, emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase '€19.99 Book now' is prominently featured at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a circular badge, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: SALE indicator
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC indicator
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, positioned near the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, SALE, Limited stock Only this weekend, €19.99 Book now, UGC
